structured_fields.jurisdiction: United States District Court, Southern District of New York
key_claims: Breach of Contract — Meridian violated Section 7.2 by accepting unauthorized compensation from NorthStar Ventures LLC
Fraud — Defendants made material misrepresentations regarding secured investor commitments
Unjust Enrichment — Meridian accepted $750,000 from NorthStar Ventures while representing Hartwell's interests
structured_fields.summary_one_line: Hartwell sues its investment advisor Meridian and its MD Thornton for breach of contract, fraud, and unjust enrichment arising from unauthorized third-party payments and false investor commitment representations that caused failure of a $50M Series B round.
